extract: If you were looking for the location from Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon, see Sandy Cave (Mystery Dungeon). Sandy Cave (Japanese: 浜辺(はまべ)の洞穴(ほらあな) Beach Cave) is a location on Melemele Island in Alola. There is an entrance to the cave on Big Wave Beach. It only appears in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.
